song.title: The Love of God 2
song.author: 2 Corinthians 13:14, Revelation 22:1
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D G The love of God and the grace of Christ, .D G And fellowship of the Holy Spirit .D G D Be with you, be with you all, .G D G D Be with you all, be with you all.
[C] . G D G From the throne of our God and the Lamb, . D G D Flows a river of water of life, .G D G D Bright as crystal, reaching man.
